textByHash.2dfaf07e492532e64a19af2e8e1ade6ff45b9301: You can never defeat me! I've been training my Combat by killing goblins around Lumbridge!
textByHash.95fa92c216eef1a1a2ee2be067141d9f68adfcaa: Don't even think about it! Make one move and I'll slit her throat!
textByHash.acc9784eaffa3547cbad7ffe9c0e7aee0ac168fc: Your little goblin friend has a role in my plan! I'm taking her to the tunnel we've built from the Lumbridge Swamp Caves to the new dwarven train track.
textByHash.75063cee79af252af1b473066149e7ee7fe9ac6e: When the cave goblins find that the dwarven train has killed their hero, there will be war between them! Saradomin's chosen children can watch as two vile underground races wipe each another out!
textByHash.32bb7a659e11a7f3539a2b94369f20ecef53cee7: At last I have defeated you, you filthy goblin!
textByHash.356c1ee5ae06d7bbdb773546d0568c37c5c88173: Any moment now the first dwarf train will come thundering down this tunnel and crush you! And then the goblins and the dwarves will go to war!
textByHash.daf9d91be8387681bec8cbca159488b8814de545: No, YOU'RE the monster! That's why you and all your filthy species must die!
textByHash.251126f98c9aae62228b271618d9acf4666bbc6d: This time your goblin friend cannot help you. You are on your own and have no way to overcome my prayers!
textByHash.fede1ef643ba82a0a241481477a45cae2dffe55c: What's happening? That weapon is overcoming Saradomin's protection! You've taken away the last of my prayer energy!
textByHash.2f243caa552ce88c5156705f0713c6464f165fa7: Bah! You win again! But someday, somehow, I will have my revenge!
textByHash.59479758fd9b3069e9a9d1802adbfaa95c27f273: So you've brought a friend down here to mock me? Well soon I will be the one mocking you!
textByHash.25b7fd405342eea56e2ea8acb920fa1e5260447d: Yes, I am! And I'm not ashamed of it! Those cave goblins are an abomination in the eyes of Holy Saradomin!
textByHash.7be1a8c5c00d28f19c3c0b7db522cb042531f808: But I have another plan to destroy them. Soon Johanhus and I will be meeting to discuss the details.
textByHash.5813fcc24210e3569e21237c4877c431dc05bb5d: And there's nothing you can do about it!
textByHash.ee4b3168ec0fbe344fcecf5a64d98a1f3968c818: Good news, brothers! Our tunnel from the water mill cellar has reached the cave goblin tunnels, and the last shipment of machinery is on its way from Keldagrim.
textByHash.7c8c9908e472d38eb7879b63e0f3b931dbe8e1b0: I'll need to take some of the low-level members to help unload the machinery at the Lumbridge water mill.
textByHash.61d98af2ec82346a1ebdf49720b91fce00cfb295: Soon the mighty River Lum will wash away those evil goblins forever!
textByHash.6703ecd8eddcf171f136cc46d1a3522ab694c2be: You and your goblin friend have interfered for the last time! Guards, kill them!
textByHash.e9ee4a7d7e61348d44b769f4cba67d898f4df0a1: Saradomin protect me from this foul goblin!
textByHash.59495b87ad438d5f077e39c7238303883a78141e: Curse you, Player, and your goblin friend! You win this time, but we will meet again!
textByHash.4bc8099a6903c6824644438ab9942672c0709a76: There was recently some damage to the castle cellar. Part of the wall has collapsed.
textByHash.9a066780c5b02c185b142f1122dfa6a861d2d368: The Duke insists that it was an earthquake, but I think some kind of monsters are to blame.
textByHash.7d3af1637b434d88b370eb70348d5e71f6de77f4: You should ask people around the town about it. Maybe someone saw something.
textByHash.0018a41c88cac3e2e7d7014080313607d2d86a8f: I asked you to talk to people around Lumbridge to see if any of them know what happened in the cellar.
textByHash.7d80ba47503e16b5fa837fab37ed17727ba4e490: A goblin? This validates my suspicion! We should tell the Duke!
textByHash.e497433087425afd0ae79297973fc4601ca6b625: Yes your grace, but if there is any possibility that this is a goblin incursion then we should take that possibility very seriously!
textByHash.9411a41c1f2b3f9f27b3ff1a39664f8e64f6f0ff: Your grace, this is the adventurer who defeated the dragon Elvarg. I think you should listen to him.
textByHash.6584f190ada7bb4628b7d0f852bd70645c35a5a0: Your grace, this is the adventurer who defeated the dragon Elvarg. I think you should listen to her.
textByHash.d67752efc861d7a3dd1a75fcf33294295325865c: Your grace, this is the adventurer who defeated the dragon Elvarg. I think you should listen to them.
textByHash.c54dc30a551bba661ba3fa1a3ae1adee54f5b74c: Your grace, this adventurer took that talisman you discovered to Sedridor. I think you should listen to him.
textByHash.9eed2656c519518147231d5c733d3e30dad51ef2: Your grace, this adventurer took that talisman you discovered to Sedridor. I think you should listen to her.
textByHash.d6bd93377266d82b6bf1f5b6f56f0ed73120f45b: Your grace, this adventurer took that talisman you discovered to Sedridor. I think you should listen to them.
textByHash.798ce2a33b7607b4efa0ee21235f8784b7458b70: The Duke asked you to investigate the damage in the cellar. I hope you can find the monsters that are behind this!
textByHash.337485b6dcc5926c8da256858d22d0be06138a2b: You see, your grace? It is a goblin attack!
textByHash.9338b0bad802a24e22e2a2cbfa93c6da07e96d9c: See, it was goblins! You should tell the Duke.
textByHash.0f8f267035d6671e85beb92d7da747d69def4a2c: It is unknown to me, your grace. But the fact it is there is enough to prove Bob's story. It must have been dropped by a goblin as it fled.
textByHash.21fa35f846518f537976e6bc933a6a40e017813c: Then it must have been stolen!
textByHash.66b52c8e94f80129865cdbf63107f94a8e87a097: That doesn't matter! You said yourself that goblins couldn't have made that, so they must have stolen it from somewhere.
textByHash.acf1e876f0db9e8ca2844942d47c882b07e50871: Horrible, thieving goblins have broken into our cellar! We must retaliate immediately!
textByHash.89fd5abe364b36314d304a8c7ed1afde74a6e48c: First we should wipe out the goblins east of the river, then we can march on the goblin village to the north-west...
textByHash.029d03925739ac327b6f32ad71284d5a166401fa: You see, your grace? I told you goblins were behind this!
textByHash.af73b31f42c8217979569f723b2352d9826413fe: At last, proof that goblins are behind this! You should tell the Duke at once!
textByHash.c6c5af4ca8e7a4cd269079a75416a211ebc727d3: What more proof do we need? Nasty, smelly goblins have been living under our feet all this time! We must crush them at once!
textByHash.2f1576b68a4096df247f5ed38aa66ce44cb57aab: I don't see how there can be any more doubt. You should tell the Duke at once!
textByHash.7ebe1cd8919030f4ba865d0a5db7e2237011b5e4: And I suppose you believe them, goblin-lover?
textByHash.23215ca75310bc68027d0bfb45f8f9a1b812dac1: The priceless Lumbridge Silverware! It comes out only on special occasions. It was kept in storage in the cellar, but now the goblins have stolen it.
textByHash.e4b9f72bca027d57053de4345f4f54a3c08b2e02: That doesn't matter. You'll never find it, because the goblins took it. So you can't stop the war!
textByHash.0ccc801fa8afa60144f32ccb536c6140fe43e494: Well, so what if I am? It's not a crime.
textByHash.abb2291bb23a8eaa6c1123d0bc199e6b53d04b1a: I... I... You're lying! I don't know what you're talking about.
textByHash.afad42ab4b39a9ce73cbf5c134488645ff82b947: Of...of course not! The goblins must have, um, dropped the silverware as they ran away.
textByHash.d8a147ea97a623f888d7459b9c47a8b0ba1e30c6: But don't you see it was for the best? For goblins to be living under our feet like this... ugh. It doesn't matter how civilized they are: all sub-human species must be wiped out!
textByHash.a3cbdde0f2e96b1979f171bdb0cf2021f6943717: I hear the Duke has a task for an adventurer. Otherwise, if you want to make yourself useful, there are always evil monsters to slay.
textByHash.da5394ac7f2bc7b46677e248bad6cff2fb91e629: I only advise the Duke. But if you want to make yourself useful, there are evil goblins to slay on the other side of the river.
textByHash.709c12f2106942fbfa65871f6602ada84df5da2b: ...And I would have gotten away with it too, if it wasn't for that pesky adventurer!
